why-invalid: the metrics_that_must_move entry omits the required "source" field
(gateway/client/engine/platform). The source is what makes the metric reference
checkable: gateway/client names must come from the Contract 2 vocabulary and engine
signals must be canonical keys resolved via the backend-capability name_mapping.
This fixture also demonstrates WHY the rule exists: it hardcodes the engine-native
name "vllm:num_requests_waiting", which varies by engine version and must never be
hardcoded (it should be source=engine, metric=queue_waiting_requests).
